metadata.name: Walnut
metadata.title: Walnut Settings
metadata.description: I've found walnut cleans nicely with gentle laser passes. Its open grain absorbs energy quickly, so it lifts dirt without much effort. This works well because the wood stays cool overall, avoiding deep burns. Just keep the beam moving steadily. Watch out for overdoing it—too much heat can char the surface, so test on a scrap first.

author.name: Yi-Chun Lin
author.title: Ph.D.
credentials: Ph.D. Materials Engineering, National Taiwan University, 2018
Post-Ph.D. fellowship at TSMC's laser fab lab, 2018-2020
Assisted in projects on ultrafast laser applications
